# 元素选择器设计 (2026-03-09 16:09Z)

_**User**_

我想设计一个元素定位器，即用户想调整页面上哪个元素直接用鼠标点击那个元素模型就可以获取到此元素及其子元素的结构和样式信息，UI界面上可以设计在输入框那里，类似如图设计，至于功能实现直接将获取到的指定元素及其子元素的结构和样式信息放入当前会话信息中，UI界面上则只显示元素选择器，类似第二张图所示。

---

_**Agent (model claude-4.6-opus-high-thinking, mode Agent)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to design an element picker/locator feature for their StyleSwift browser extension. Let me understand the requirements:

1. Users can click on any element on the page to select it
2. The extension captures the selected element and its children's structure and style information
3. The UI should have an element picker button near the input box (like the first image shows)
4. When an element is selected, it shows a preview in the UI (like the second image shows - "Selected Element" with a close button)
5. The captured element info should be added to the current conversation/session

Let me first explore the codebase to understand the current structure.</details></think>

---
